features: Toilet Training - addition to your toddlers potty training routine, Easy to use and fun, moist toilet tissues are ideal for teaching your child independence and to freshen up on their own

99 Percent Water Based - with 0 Percent perfume and 0 Percent paraben, dermatologically tested and clinically proven to be suitable for the most delicate of skins, Extremely soft, fragrance free and suitable for sensitive skin even babies
Flushable - Our wet toilet tissues are safe to flush down a standard toilet, For results, flush only 1 or 2 wipes at a time
Biodegradable - Made from 100 percent plant-based cellulosic material, Kandoo toilet tissues are non plastic, flushable in the toilet and biodegradable in water
Child-Friendly Size - Kandoo moist toilet tissues are small in size, to adapt to children's little hands, The small surface area also ensures optimal contact with the skin
description: Product Description Kandoo Aquas moist toilet tissues are a addition to your toddlers potty training routine. The wet toilet tissues are small in size, to adapt to children's little hands. The small surface area also ensures optimal contact with the skin. Easy to use and fun, our toilet tissues are ideal for teaching your child independence and to freshen up on their own. Introduce you child to Diddit the Frog and make toilet training fun. Diddit has already helped generations of children potty train and is here to help guide you and your child too, just search for 'Kandoo Toilet Training Rewards' and start the adventure with our storybook, reward charts and more. Our toddlers moist toilet tissues are dermatologically tested and have a neutral pH, so gentle on the skin that they are suitable for the whole family. 99 Percent water composition and specially formulated lotion ensure gentle yet effective cleaning. Paediatrician approved for all skin types including sensitive skin. Our moist toilet tissues are safe to flush down a standard toilet. For results, use no more than 1 or 2 wipes at a time. Made from 100 percent plant-based cellulosic material, Kandoo wipes are non plastic, flushable in the toilet and biodegradable in water. Do not use in macerator toilets, toilets with a grinder or portable ones. Ingredients 99% Aqua, <1% Glycerin, Hydroxyacetophenone, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid Directions Teach toddlers to use the moist toilet tissues independently during potty training as part of their potty training routine. See more
